emails.subject: UPDATE - Bloomberg
emails.body: UPDATE Bloomberg Mark spoke to Bloomberg and their attorney with Wilkie Farr, and they made substantial revisions to the form. I just faxed a clean and blacklined draft to them and am waiting to get their approval. Will you be around to sign?
